title: Hungarian PM faces ‘false flag’ claims after Serbia says explosives found near pipeline
description: Incident prompts political scrutiny across Hungary as Viktor Orbán trails in polls before next Sunday’s election
content: Serbia has said it found “explosives of devastating power” near a pipeline that carries Russian natural gas to Hungary and beyond, sparking claims by Hungary’s leading opposition candidate of a possible “false flag” operation aimed at influencing the... [5663 chars]

title: Tributes to 'fun, bright' boy, 13, killed in Flitwick crash
description: Noah Campbell's family say he was a "talented, versatile sportsman" who was "incredibly well-liked".
content:
The family of a 13-year-old who died in a crash have paid tribute to a "fun, bright, handsome, athletic" boy who was "incredibly well-liked".
Noah Campbell died in a collision between a car, a bike and a scooter in Flitwick, Bedfordshire, at 23:50 BS... [1356 chars]

title: Baby and mother among three killed after tree topples during Easter egg hunt in Germany
description: The incident took place as around 50 people from a nearby residential facility for new mothers, pregnant women and children looked for eggs in the area.
content:
A 10-month-old girl has died along with two other people after a tree toppled during an Easter egg hunt in northern Germany, police say.
The 100-foot tree fell on four people participating in the event on Sunday morning in woods near the town of Satr... [842 chars]

title: Family of 13-year-old boy who died in Flitwick crash 'utterly devastated' - as man and woman charged
description: Another boy involved in the crash remains in hospital in a serious condition, while the other was treated for serious injuries and has been discharged, police have said.
content:
The family of a 13-year-old boy who died in a crash in Bedfordshire have said they are "utterly devastated".
The teenager, identified as Noah Campbell, died after a car was involved in a crash with him and two other teenage boys on Friday night in Fl... [2695 chars]

title: ‘Unhinged madman’: US politicians react to Trump’s expletive-laden threat to Iran
description: Marjorie Taylor Greene and Bernie Sanders among those responding with alarm to Trump writing ‘open the fuckin’ strait, you crazy bastards’
content: Some US politicians have reacted with alarm and questioned the US president’s mental state after Donald Trump issued an abusive, expletive-laden threat to Iran in which he called on the regime to “open the fuckin’ strait [of Hormuz], you crazy bastar... [5649 chars]
